project.name: ORISO-TenantService

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with repository metadata and the service entry point to understand the TenantService runtime.

tour.title: Tenant API Boundary
tour.description: Review the OpenAPI contract and controller layer that expose tenant and tenant-admin endpoints.

tour.title: Tenant Lifecycle Orchestration
tour.description: Follow the facade and service classes that create, update, delete, search, and synchronize tenants.

tour.title: Tenant Admin Controls
tour.description: Inspect the current tenant admin controls model, repository, service, API contract additions, and migration.

tour.title: Auth And Tenant Context
tour.description: Review JWT authority mapping and tenant resolution before changing protected routes or access rules.

tour.description: Inspect generated service contracts and wrapper services for ConsultingType, ApplicationSettings, and UserAdmin synchronization.

tour.description: Review CI/CD, Docker, Maven, and runtime configuration used to build and operate the service.
